welcome_subtitle: Your Daily Gateway to Instant Fun
welcome_desc_1: Discover the ultimate collection of free online games designed for instant entertainment. Gamiary brings you carefully curated gaming experiences including beloved classics like Mahjong, exciting puzzle challenges, racing adventures, and much more - all playable directly in your browser without downloads or installations.
welcome_desc_2: Track your gaming journey, discover new favorites, and enjoy a personalized gaming experience that grows with you. Every game session is an opportunity to explore, challenge yourself, and have fun.
track_journey_desc: Monitor your progress, discover your favorite game types, and build a personalized gaming profile.
discover_games_desc: Explore our carefully curated collection of 700+ games. Find hidden gems and new favorites.
instant_play_desc: Start playing immediately with no downloads or installations required. Browser ready.
cross_platform_desc: Play on any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile. Consistent experience everywhere.
always_free_desc: Complete access to all games without any hidden costs or premium restrictions.
daily_gaming_desc: Create your daily game log with instant access. Just pure gaming enjoyment whenever you want.
quick_start_picks: Quick start picks: free online games no signup, instant play browser games, and mobile‑friendly HTML5 games for short breaks.
about_title: About Gamiary: Free Instant Browser Games
about_desc: Gamiary is your go‑to destination for free online mini games — no downloads, no installs, just instant play. We hand‑pick high‑quality HTML5 games across fan‑favorite categories like Puzzle, Action, Racing, Sports, Strategy, Clicker, Adventure, Beauty, Horror.
